items.briefing:
A newly discovered vulnerability in Microsoft Copilot, dubbed "SearchLeak," allows attackers to steal data from users with just one click. If your organisation uses Microsoft 365 Copilot, be aware that simply interacting with a malicious prompt could expose sensitive files or emails. Separately, research has found that Reddit content can be easily manipulated to influence AI-powered search tools, meaning AI-generated answers staff rely on for research may sometimes reflect planted misinformation rather than reliable sources.

When using AI tools for work research, always verify important information against trusted, official sources before acting on it.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's cyber security strategy enters phase two, setting national direction for critical infrastructure protection.
